Mentions Timeline (3 articles)
3304-06-17
Week in Review
Weekly summary covering Aisling Duval's anti-slavery campaign merging with Universal Liberty to form Unchain, Lori Jameson's denunciation of the League of Reparation, journalist Flint Lafosse's theory about unsolved League murders, Dr Alfred Ulyanov's article on the Far God cult, Senator Caspian Leopold's refugee centre initiative, and the conclusion of the Lave Radio Network vs Lave Jet Family rivalry.
3304-06-14
Anti Slavery Organisations Unite
Princess Aisling Duval's anti-slavery campaign merges with independent charity Universal Liberty to form Unchain. Jarl Toredo, former head of Universal Liberty who was born into slavery, announces the union and calls for the abolition of legal slavery across the Empire. When asked about rumours of a romance with Aisling Duval, Toredo says only that he suspects Her Highness's attention is focused elsewhere.
3304-05-26
The Courtship of Aisling Duval
Entertainment journalist Solomon Helios identified three potential romantic suitors for Princess Aisling Duval in a special broadcast. Senator Caspian Leopold, anti-slavery campaigner Jarl Toredo of Universal Liberty, and Federal Ambassador Jordan Rochester were named as possible matches, following Aisling's rejection of Admiral Denton Patreus.
